case_title: NWEKE REGINA VS DEMELLOS KEN MR et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $570.00 FILED BY DEMELLOS KEN MR DEMELLOS MAUREEN MRS DEMELLOS NEW AND USED FURNITURE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NWEKE REGINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
POS ON REGINA NWEKE SERVED LESS THAN 5 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DEMELLOS KEN MR DEMELLOS MAUREEN MRS DEMELLOS NEW AND USED FURNITURE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NWEKE REGINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
